FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class Button.Style

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A button's visual style. Colours resolve from Tok in the computed default styles below. State colours follow WinUI's 4-state matrix (normal/hover/pressed/disabled) for fill, foreground and border.

public sealed record Button.Style : IEquatable<Button.Style>
Inheritance
object
Button.Style

IEquatable<Button.Style>

Properties

Background 

public ColorF Background { get; init; }

Property Value

ColorF

BackgroundSizing

WinUI BackgroundSizing: DefaultButtonStyle = InnerBorderEdge (Button_themeresources.xaml:156); the accent style overrides to OuterBorderEdge. See BackgroundSizing for the renderer-mapping note.

public BackgroundSizing BackgroundSizing { get; init; }

Property Value

BackgroundSizing

Bold 

public bool Bold { get; init; }

Property Value

bool

BorderBrush

The one border knob: a WinUI elevation gradient (the default) or a solid via GradientSpec.Solid(c).

public GradientSpec? BorderBrush { get; init; }

Property Value

GradientSpec?

BorderWidth 

public float BorderWidth { get; init; }

Property Value

float

BrushTransitionMs

WinUI ContentPresenter.BackgroundTransition = BrushTransition 83ms (Button_themeresources.xaml:173-175): a re-render that flips the resting fill on a live node cross-fades instead of snapping (the E3 primitive). WinUI scopes the transition to Background only; the engine routes border diffs through the same ramp — a documented sub-100ms over-coverage. NaN = snap.

public float BrushTransitionMs { get; init; }

Property Value

float

CornerRadius 

public float CornerRadius { get; init; }

Property Value

float

GradientSpec?

DisabledForeground 

public ColorF DisabledForeground { get; init; }

Property Value

ColorF

FocusVisualMargin

WinUI FocusVisualMargin = −3: the keyboard focus ring sits 3px OUTSIDE the bounds (Button_themeresources.xaml:167). The engine draws the ring (E1).

public Edges4 FocusVisualMargin { get; init; }

Property Value

Edges4

FontSize 

public float FontSize { get; init; }

Property Value

float

Foreground 

public ColorF Foreground { get; init; }

Property Value

ColorF

HorizontalContentAlignment

WinUI HorizontalContentAlignment equivalent (main-axis Justify of the row box). WinUI Control default = Center (dxaml\xcp\components\DependencyObject\DependencyProperty.cpp:646-648) — content centres when the button is wider than its label.

public FlexJustify HorizontalContentAlignment { get; init; }

Property Value

FlexJustify

ColorF

VerticalContentAlignment

WinUI VerticalContentAlignment equivalent (cross-axis AlignItems). WinUI Control default = Center (DependencyProperty.cpp:650-652).

public FlexAlign VerticalContentAlignment { get; init; }

Property Value

FlexAlign
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
